reasoning: The control 8.2.8 focuses on system/session idle timeout features, which are typically managed at the application or operating system level rather than within Kubernetes itself. Kubernetes does not natively manage session timeouts for applications running within pods, as this is generally the responsibility of the application or middleware layer. Therefore, there is no direct Kubernetes security control or configuration that maps to this requirement.
title: Examine system configuration settings to verify that system/session idle timeout features for use...
